name: Bench Press
notes: Flat barbell bench press. Primary chest mass builder.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
notes: Targets upper chest. Angle bench to 30-45 degrees.

name: Dumbbell Flyes
notes: Chest stretch and squeeze. Use light weight, control the negative.

name: Cable Crossover
notes: Great isolation finisher. Squeeze at center.

name: Push-Up
notes: Bodyweight classic. Can be done anywhere.

name: Decline Bench Press
notes: Targets lower chest. 15-30 degree decline.

name: Chest Dip
notes: Add weight with a dip belt when bodyweight becomes easy.

name: Deadlift
notes: The king of lifts. Keep bar close to body, brace hard.

name: Barbell Row
notes: Bent-over row. Back thickness builder.

name: Pull-Up
notes: Wide grip for width, chin-ups for biceps.

name: Seated Cable Row
notes: Squeeze shoulder blades together at peak contraction.

name: Dumbbell Row
notes: Single arm row. Supports lower back better than barbell row.

name: Face Pull
notes: Great for rear delts and posture. Use rope attachment.

name: Lat Pulldown
notes: Alternative when pull-ups are too challenging.

name: Hyperextension
notes: Strengthens lower back. Add weight holding a plate.

name: Overhead Press
notes: Standing or seated. Main shoulder mass builder.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
notes: Easier on shoulders than barbell. Good for higher reps.

name: Lateral Raise
notes: Side delt isolation. Light weight, controlled reps.

name: Front Raise
notes: Front delt isolation. Can also use a plate.

name: Rear Delt Fly
notes: Bent-over or seated rear delt isolation.

name: Upright Row
notes: Use wide grip to avoid shoulder impingement.

name: Shrug
notes: Trap isolation. Heavy weight, hold at top for 1 second.

name: Barbell Squat
notes: Full range of motion squat. Core leg builder.

name: Leg Press
notes: Great for volume. Can go heavy with lower back support.

name: Romanian Deadlift
notes: Hamstring and glute focus. Hinge at hips, slight knee bend.

name: Leg Curl
notes: Hamstring isolation. Seated or lying.

name: Leg Extension
notes: Quad isolation. Control both up and down.

name: Standing Calf Raise
notes: Standing calf raise on a block or machine.

name: Seated Calf Raise
notes: Targets soleus muscle.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
notes: Rear foot elevated. Great for balance and unilateral strength.

name: Lunge
notes: Walking or stationary. Great glute and quad exercise.

name: Glute Bridge
notes: Hip thrust variation. Add a barbell across hips for weight.

name: Hip Thrust
notes: Best glute builder. Shoulders on bench, barbell across hips.

name: Barbell Curl
notes: Standing barbell bicep curl. Mass builder.

name: Dumbbell Curl
notes: Alternating or simultaneous. Squeeze at top.

name: Hammer Curl
notes: Neutral grip. Targets brachialis for thicker arms.

name: Preacher Curl
notes: E-Z bar on preacher bench. Strict form, no swinging.

name: Concentration Curl
notes: Seated, elbow against inner thigh. Peak contraction.

name: Cable Curl
notes: Constant tension throughout the movement.

name: Tricep Pushdown
notes: Rope or straight bar. Keep elbows pinned to sides.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
notes: One or two arms. Stretch the long head.

name: Skull Crusher
notes: Lying tricep extension. E-Z bar recommended for wrist comfort.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
notes: Hands shoulder-width apart. Tricep + inner chest.

name: Tricep Kickback
notes: Bent-over with dumbbell. Squeeze at lockout.

name: Crunch
notes: Basic ab exercise. Focus on contraction, not momentum.

name: Plank
notes: Hold position for time. Keep core braced and body straight.

name: Leg Raise
notes: Hanging or lying. Lower abs focus.

name: Cable Crunch
notes: Kneeling cable crunch. Loadable ab exercise.

name: Russian Twist
notes: Rotational core. Add a dumbbell or plate for weight.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
notes: Anti-extension core exercise. Start from knees.

name: Treadmill
notes: Walking or running. Record duration and distance.

name: Stationary Bike
notes: Low impact cardio. Record duration and distance.

name: Rowing Machine
notes: Full body cardio. Focus on form: legs back arms.

name: Jump Rope
notes: High calorie burn. Record time or reps.
